Gateway of India

Place Name

Gateway of India is one of the most famous tourist attractions in Mumbai, India.

Place Image

Description

The Gateway of India was built in 1924 to commemorate the visit of King George V and Queen Mary to India. It is located on the waterfront in Mumbai and is one of the city's most visited monuments.

Every year millions of tourists visit this beautiful place to enjoy the sea view, photography, and nearby attractions.

Highlights

  • Historical Monument
  • Beautiful Sea View
  • Boat Ride Available
  • Photography Spot
